channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court rebuffs request for do-over in Voting Rights Act redistricting case
item.description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday turned down a request to take a mulligan on last week's major Voting Rights Act ruling, freeing Louisiana to rush a red...

item.title: FBI Raids Virginia Democrat Leader’s Office As Part Of ‘Major Corruption Probe’
item.description: The FBI raided the office of Virginia’s Democrat Senate president pro tempore on Wednesday as part of what sources reportedly say is a “major corrupti...

item.title: The American Medical Establishment Didn’t Discover A Mental Health Crisis, It Created One
item.description: Schools are a gateway for needlessly putting children on drugs.

item.title: ‘We Have To Take Ownership’: Gorsuch Urges Americans To Take Self-Governance Seriously
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch has a very simple message for America ahead of its 250th birthday: Take self-governance seriously or risk losing th...
